chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 777 - وَ سَأَلَهُ: عَنِ اَلْخَلاَخِلِ هَلْ يَصْلُحُ لُبْسُهَا لِلنِّسَاءِ وَ اَلصِّبْيَانِ قَالَ «إِنْ كُنَّ صَمَّاءَ فَلاَ بَأْسَ وَ إِنْ كَانَ لَهَا صَوْتٌ فَلاَ يَصْلُحُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.777 – He (Ali ibn Ja’far ) asked Him, Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as), about whether it is permissible for women and children to wear anklets.
Imam (as) said: "If they are silent (do not make noise), there is no harm, but if they produce sound, it is not appropriate”.
